expectations.text: The controller sets Content-Type, Cache-Control, and X-Accel-Buffering headers
expectations.evidence: Both stream_hijack (lines 3-5) and stream_live (lines 30-32) set all three headers

expectations.text: One action implements the with_stream pattern using response.headers['rack.hijack'] and proc
expectations.evidence: Uses custom ResponseStream class instead of rack.hijack pattern. The with_stream helper is called but not defined in the code using the required rack.hijack approach

expectations.text: One action includes ActionController::Live and writes to response.stream
expectations.evidence: stream_live writes to response.stream via ResponseStream.emit but does not include ActionController::Live

expectations.text: Both endpoints handle IOError for client disconnect
expectations.evidence: stream_hijack has 'rescue IOError' (line 24), stream_live has 'rescue IOError, ActionController::Live::ClientDisconnected' (line 41)

expectations.text: Both endpoints close the stream in ensure blocks
expectations.evidence: stream_hijack has no ensure block with stream.close; stream_live has proper ensure block (lines 45-46) but stream_hijack does not

expectations.text: The controller uses AgUiProtocol::Encoder::EventEncoder to encode events before writing to the streams
The endpoints stream specific AG-UI events such as RunStartedEvent and RunFinishedEvent
expectations.evidence: Streams generic events: 'connection', 'message', 'ack', 'error', 'function_call_result' - no RunStartedEvent or RunFinishedEvent
